nodes.name: Makira thrush
nodes.summary: The Makira thrush (Zoothera margaretae), also known as the San Cristobal thrush, is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to the Solomon Islands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References

nodes.name: Zoothera
nodes.summary: Zoothera（Zoothera）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联21种鸟类，如长尾地鸫、四川淡背地鸫、Geomalia等21种鸟类。
